title: Vaccine — strong support and contradiction
notes: Synthetic; controlled ground truth. VERIFY before publishing.
manuscript: The vaccine reduced symptomatic infection by 71% versus placebo.1 The vaccine also prevented severe disease in immunocompromised adults.2

goldClaims.originalText: The vaccine reduced symptomatic infection by 71% versus placebo.1
goldClaims.text: The vaccine reduced symptomatic infection by 71% versus placebo

goldClaims.originalText: The vaccine also prevented severe disease in immunocompromised adults.2
goldClaims.text: The vaccine also prevented severe disease in immunocompromised adults

1.name: TRIAL-V primary (Osei 2024)
1.text: Vaccine efficacy against symptomatic infection was 71% (95% CI 62-78) compared with placebo.

2.name: TRIAL-V immunocompromised substudy
2.text: In immunocompromised adults, vaccine efficacy against severe disease was not demonstrated; rates of severe disease were similar between vaccine and placebo recipients.

goldVerdicts.claimText: The vaccine reduced symptomatic infection by 71% versus placebo
goldVerdicts.rationale: Ref states 71% efficacy (95% CI 62-78) vs placebo explicitly.

goldVerdicts.claimText: The vaccine also prevented severe disease in immunocompromised adults
goldVerdicts.rationale: Ref says efficacy against severe disease was not demonstrated and rates were similar — negates 'prevented' (rule 1/2).
